items.name: Blazer
items.description:
🩷 Kate’s Bloom
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Kate%E2%80%99s+Bloom&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Hey! Thanks for checking out Kate’s Bloom 💐

I make cute, stylish outfits inspired by everything from coquette and Y2K to kawaii, softcore, and preppy girl vibes. If you’re into aesthetic fashion, this group is for you.

Every purchase really helps me keep uploading more—and I seriously appreciate the support. Even if you just favorite the group, it means a lot. 💖

👉 Shop and support

🔍 Tags: coquette roblox, aesthetic outfits, y2k fashion, soft girl, roblox clothes for girls, kawaii roblox
